Today's Action Plan
🚀
Put more money into Summer Sale
8.2 out of 100 people who see it click it — your best ad right now. Moving 20% more budget here this week could bring in ~60 extra customers.
View details →
⚠️
Brand Video is getting tired
Clicks dropped 40% in 48 hours. Your audience has probably seen it too many times. Time to swap in a fresh version.
View details →
🛑
Stop paying for Cold Audience
You've spent $120 with only 1.8% of people clicking. That money would work 4× harder in Summer Sale right now.
View details →

Built for real people

We speak human.
Not ad-speak.

Every number in Adlentix is explained in plain English. No jargon. No confusion. Just clarity.

CTR
How often people click your ad
“8 out of every 100 who see it click it.”
CPC
What you pay each time someone clicks
“That one visitor cost you $1.20.”
Impressions
How many people saw your ad
“142,400 people scrolled past it this week.”
ROAS
How much money you made per dollar
“You spent $1 and made $4.20 back.”
Conversion
Someone who clicked and then bought
“284 people bought after clicking.”
Ad Fatigue
Your audience is tired of seeing it
“Clicks are dropping — time for a fresh ad.”
How it works

Three steps.
Zero confusion.

01

Connect your ad accounts

Link Google, Meta, or LinkedIn in under 60 seconds. Secure read-only access — we see your data, never touch your campaigns.

OAuth 2.0 · Read-only · No password shared
02

We watch everything for you

Adlentix syncs your numbers every hour and scans for wasted spend, sudden drops, and hidden wins — automatically, all day long.

Hourly sync · Zero manual exports
03

Wake up with your action plan

Three clear actions every morning — what to scale, what to fix, what to stop paying for. Plain English. No analysis paralysis.

Daily brief at 7:00 AM · Max 3 actions
Features

Everything you need.
Nothing you don't.

Know exactly what to do every morning

Wake up to 3 clear actions based on your actual ad data. Not reports or dashboards — just: scale this, fix that, stop paying for this. Written in plain English.

  • Delivered at 7:00 AM every day
  • Maximum 3 actions — never overwhelming
  • Backed by real data from your accounts

Pricing

Start free.
Upgrade when ready.

No credit card. No tricks. Free forever on the basics.

Free
$0
forever · no card needed
  • ✓Connect 1 ad account
  • ✓Full plain-English dashboard
  • ✓Daily brief (up to 3 campaigns)
  • ✓Campaign health scores
  • ✓Creative tracking
  • ✓1 spend alert per day
  • ✓30-day data history
  • ✓Up to 5 campaigns tracked
Get started free
Most Popular
Pro
$29
per month · or $249/year
  • ✓Everything in Free
  • ✓Unlimited accounts & campaigns
  • ✓Unlimited spend alerts
  • ✓AI revenue recommendations (in dollars)
  • ✓Weekly PDF report — every Monday 7am
  • ✓1-year data history
  • ✓Google + Meta + LinkedIn combined view
  • ✓Priority support
